## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded personal paths, usernames, or credentials
- [ ] `.env` is NOT committed (only `.env.template` if changed)
- [ ] No API keys, cookies, or auth tokens in any file
- [ ] Tested locally with `sync.py push --dry-run`
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] PR is focused on one change
